name: C-18 --apply-to-controls --strict disables a stale-source control instead of demoting to pending
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch && printf '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z' > .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/soc2-tsc.txt && printf -- '- framework: soc2-tsc
  control_id: CC1.1
  legal_review_status: reviewed
' > controls.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/control-mapping-gate.sh" --apply-to-controls --controls-file controls.yaml --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --strict && grep -q 'legal_review_status: disabled' controls.yaml && echo disabled 1>&2
